---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for MiCA
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the situation where current MiCA falls short. (e.g., "When I try to X, MiCA does Y, but I want Z.")

## Proposed solution

What you'd like MiCA to do instead. Sketches, mockups, or example flows are welcome.

## Alternatives you've considered

If you've thought about other ways to solve the same problem, list them here.

## Scope check

- [ ] This fits MiCA's "self-hosted single-user marketing automation" scope (see README "Limitations and roadmap")
- [ ] This would require a backend / server-side component (please flag — that's a larger architectural shift)
- [ ] I'd be willing to contribute the implementation if the approach is agreed
